entry.title: Mauritius Oil Spill Explained In Tamil IAF Operation Oneindia Tamil

link.title: Mauritius Oil Spill Explained In Tamil IAF Operation Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
Authorities in Mauritius have arrested the Indian captain of the Japanese ship that ran aground near Mauritius and spilled 1,000 tons of oil on the Indian Ocean island’s protected coastline Mauritius oil spill explained in Tamil
மொரீசியஸ் கடற்பகுதியில் எண்ணெய் கசிவினால் சுற்றுச்சூழல் மாசுபாட்டை ஏற்படுத்தியதாக கூறி ஜப்பான் கப்பலின் இந்திய கேப்டனை அந்நாட்டு அரசு கைது செய்துள்ளது. மொரீசியஸ் கடற்பகுதியில் எப்படி விபத்து ஏற்பட்டது..இதனால் ஏற்படும் விளைவுகள், இந்தியாவின் உதவி, கைது செய்யப்பட்ட இந்தியாவைச் சேர்ந்த ஜப்பான் கப்பல் கேப்டன் பற்றிய தகவல்கள்.
#MauritiusOilSpill
#DefenceNewsTamil
entry.summary: Authorities in Mauritius have arrested the Indian captain of the Japanese ship that ran aground near Mauritius and spilled 1,000 tons of oil on the Indian Ocean island’s protected coastline Mauritius oil spill explained in Tamil மொரீசியஸ் கடற்பகுதியில் எண்ணெய் கசிவினால் சுற்றுச்சூழல் மாசுபாட்டை ஏற்படுத்தியதாக கூறி ஜப்பான் கப்பலின் இந்திய கேப்டனை அந்நாட்டு அரசு கைது செய்துள்ளது. மொரீசியஸ் கடற்பகுதியில் எப்படி விபத்து ஏற்பட்டது..இதனால் ஏற்படும் விளைவுகள், இந்தியாவின் உதவி, கைது செய்யப்பட்ட இந்தியாவைச் சேர்ந்த ஜப்பான் கப்பல் கேப்டன் பற்றிய தகவல்கள். #MauritiusOilSpill #DefenceNewsTamil

entry.title: Ducati Panigale V2 India Launch Date Confirmed

link.title: Ducati Panigale V2 India Launch Date Confirmed

entry.content:
Ducati has confirmed the launch of their entry-level superbike the Panigale V2 in the Indian market. The Ducati Panigale V2 will go on sale in India on the 26th of August 2020 and will replace the old Panigale 959 from the brand’s lineup.
The entry-level Panigale V2 superbike was scheduled to go on sale earlier, however, the launch was delayed due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The Panigale V2 will also be the first BS6-compliant model from the brand, with Ducati also said to have started accepting bookings for the same for a token amount of Rs 1 lakh. Watch the video to know all the details of the upcoming Ducati Panigale V2.
entry.summary: Ducati has confirmed the launch of their entry-level superbike the Panigale V2 in the Indian market. The Ducati Panigale V2 will go on sale in India on the 26th of August 2020 and will replace the old Panigale 959 from the brand’s lineup. The entry-level Panigale V2 superbike was scheduled to go on sale earlier, however, the launch was delayed due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The Panigale V2 will also be the first BS6-compliant model from the brand, with Ducati also said to have started accepting bookings for the same for a token amount of Rs 1 lakh. Watch the video to know all the details of the upcoming Ducati Panigale V2.

entry.title: Telangana Hydroelectric Plant : 9 मजदूरों के शव बरामद, राष्ट्रपति, PM ने जताया दुख वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Telangana Hydroelectric Plant : 9 मजदूरों के शव बरामद, राष्ट्रपति, PM ने जताया दुख वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
After the fire at the Srisailam Hydel Power Plant in Telangana, the bodies of all nine people have been recovered in a rescue operation. However, in the beginning only the bodies of 6 people could be taken out. But by five o’clock in the evening, the bodies of all the laborers have been recovered. All the bodies were found at the exit gate, which seems that everyone tried their best to escape. At present, the investigation of this case has started. Many celebrities including Prime Minister Narendra Modi, President Ram Nath Kovind have expressed grief over this accident.
तेलंगाना के श्रीशैलम हाइडल पावर प्लांट में लगी आग के बाद रेस्क्यू ऑपरेशन में सभी नौ लोगों के शव बरामद कर लिए गए हैं. हालांकि शुरुआत में सिर्फ 6 लोगों के शव ही बाहर निकाले जा सके थे. लेकिन शाम पांच बजे तक सभी मजदूरों के शव बरामद कर लिए गए हैं. इस हादसे पर प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी, राष्ट्रपति रामनाथ कोविंद समेत तमाम हस्तियों ने दुख व्यक्त किया है.
#Telangana #HydelPowerPlant #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: After the fire at the Srisailam Hydel Power Plant in Telangana, the bodies of all nine people have been recovered in a rescue operation. However, in the beginning only the bodies of 6 people could be taken out. But by five o’clock in the evening, the bodies of all the laborers have been recovered. All the bodies were found at the exit gate, which seems that everyone tried their best to escape. At present, the investigation of this case has started. Many celebrities including Prime Minister Narendra Modi, President Ram Nath Kovind have expressed grief over this accident. तेलंगाना के श्रीशैलम हाइडल पावर प्लांट में लगी आग के बाद रेस्क्यू ऑपरेशन में सभी नौ लोगों के शव बरामद कर लिए गए हैं. हालांकि शुरुआत में सिर्फ 6 लोगों के शव ही बाहर निकाले जा सके थे. लेकिन शाम पांच बजे तक सभी मजदूरों के शव बरामद कर लिए गए हैं. इस हादसे पर प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी, राष्ट्रपति रामनाथ कोविंद समेत तमाम हस्तियों ने दुख व्यक्त किया है. #Telangana #HydelPowerPlant #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Coronavirus - A Marseille, les renforts de CRS sont arrivés pour faire respecter le port du masque en centre-ville

link.title: Coronavirus - A Marseille, les renforts de CRS sont arrivés pour faire respecter le port du masque en centre-ville

entry.content:
En plus des effectifs des polices nationales et municipales, qui arpentent au quotidien les rues, un escadron de 130 CRS est arrivé ce lundi pour faire appliquer un arrêté préfectoral qui a du mal à être respecté à Marseille.
"Il y a des difficultés à faire appliquer le port du masque, reconnait Gabriel Attal, le porte-parole du gouvernement. Mais je ne suis pas là pour donner des leçons de morale. Je me mets aussi à la place des Français à qui on a expliqué durant la première partie de l’épidémie que le masque n’était pas utile face à l’épidémie. Aujourd’hui, on leur dit que celui-ci est utile, nécessaire et obligatoire. Je comprends que ce soit difficile à comprendre. Mais l’état des connaissances a évolué et on considère aujourd’hui que c’est une barrière face à l’épidémie."
entry.summary: En plus des effectifs des polices nationales et municipales, qui arpentent au quotidien les rues, un escadron de 130 CRS est arrivé ce lundi pour faire appliquer un arrêté préfectoral qui a du mal à être respecté à Marseille. "Il y a des difficultés à faire appliquer le port du masque, reconnait Gabriel Attal, le porte-parole du gouvernement. Mais je ne suis pas là pour donner des leçons de morale. Je me mets aussi à la place des Français à qui on a expliqué durant la première partie de l’épidémie que le masque n’était pas utile face à l’épidémie. Aujourd’hui, on leur dit que celui-ci est utile, nécessaire et obligatoire. Je comprends que ce soit difficile à comprendre. Mais l’état des connaissances a évolué et on considère aujourd’hui que c’est une barrière face à l’épidémie."

entry.title: Fakta Kebakaran Hebat di Gedung Kejaksaan RI

link.title: Fakta Kebakaran Hebat di Gedung Kejaksaan RI

entry.content:
Kebakaran di Gedung Kejaksaan Agung RI di Jalan Sultan Hasanudin Dalam, Kebayoran Baru, Jakarta Selatan akhirnya padam setelah Damkar DKI mengerahkan 65 unit mobil pemadam kebakaran.
Link Terkait:
Kejagung melalui akun Twitter resmi mereka, @KejaksaanRI, menegaskan kebakaran bukan bersumber dari gedung tindak pidana khusus dan umum, melainkan dari gedung bidang pembinaan dan intelijen. Koordinator Masyarakat Anti Korupsi Indonesia Boyamin Saiman juga meyakini berkas perkara Djoko Tjandra aman dari kebakaran. Boyamin mengatakan kasus Djoko Tjandra ditangani Jaksa Agung Muda Tindak Pidana Khusus yang ruang kerjanya berada di gedung bundar, bukan di area yang terbakar. Sementara itu, Polda Metro Jaya masih menyelidiki penyebab kebakaran Gedung Kejaksaan Agung (Kejagung) setelah proses pemadaman api selesai.
#Kebakaran #KejaksaanAgung #Api
Video Editor: Yulita Futty
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Kebakaran di Gedung Kejaksaan Agung RI di Jalan Sultan Hasanudin Dalam, Kebayoran Baru, Jakarta Selatan akhirnya padam setelah Damkar DKI mengerahkan 65 unit mobil pemadam kebakaran. Link Terkait: Kejagung melalui akun Twitter resmi mereka, @KejaksaanRI, menegaskan kebakaran bukan bersumber dari gedung tindak pidana khusus dan umum, melainkan dari gedung bidang pembinaan dan intelijen. Koordinator Masyarakat Anti Korupsi Indonesia Boyamin Saiman juga meyakini berkas perkara Djoko Tjandra aman dari kebakaran. Boyamin mengatakan kasus Djoko Tjandra ditangani Jaksa Agung Muda Tindak Pidana Khusus yang ruang kerjanya berada di gedung bundar, bukan di area yang terbakar. Sementara itu, Polda Metro Jaya masih menyelidiki penyebab kebakaran Gedung Kejaksaan Agung (Kejagung) setelah proses pemadaman api selesai. #Kebakaran #KejaksaanAgung #Api Video Editor: Yulita Futty ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Netflix fait polémique avec la promotion américaine du film « Mignonnes »

link.title: Netflix fait polémique avec la promotion américaine du film « Mignonnes »

entry.content: Netflix va certainement se poser plus de questions à l’avenir sur sa façon de promouvoir les films. La plateforme de streaming a fait polémique sur les réseaux sociaux avec son affiche américaine du film français « Mignonnes ». Comme le rapporte notamment le magazine spécialisé « Variety », plusieurs internautes ont reproché à l’affiche de sexualiser des fillettes de 11 ans.
entry.summary: Netflix va certainement se poser plus de questions à l’avenir sur sa façon de promouvoir les films. La plateforme de streaming a fait polémique sur les réseaux sociaux avec son affiche américaine du film français « Mignonnes ». Comme le rapporte notamment le magazine spécialisé « Variety », plusieurs internautes ont reproché à l’affiche de sexualiser des fillettes de 11 ans.

entry.title: Amanah, PKR call on DAP Youth to apologise over Chinese road sign stickers

link.title: Amanah, PKR call on DAP Youth to apologise over Chinese road sign stickers

entry.content:
Selangor Amanah Youth lodged a police report today against Plantation, Industries, and Commodities Minister Khairuddin Aman Razali, who was accused of violating the 14-day quarantine order after returning from Turkey last month.
Meanwhile, at a separate event today, Deputy Health Minister Dr Noor Azmi Ghazali said there will be no double standard when it comes to punishing those who flout Covid-19 standard operating procedures (SOP), including top government officials.
entry.summary: Selangor Amanah Youth lodged a police report today against Plantation, Industries, and Commodities Minister Khairuddin Aman Razali, who was accused of violating the 14-day quarantine order after returning from Turkey last month. Meanwhile, at a separate event today, Deputy Health Minister Dr Noor Azmi Ghazali said there will be no double standard when it comes to punishing those who flout Covid-19 standard operating procedures (SOP), including top government officials.

entry.title: Documentary on Sultan ul Ashiqeen Complete Life History of Sultan Mohammad Najib ur Rehman

link.title: Documentary on Sultan ul Ashiqeen Complete Life History of Sultan Mohammad Najib ur Rehman

entry.content:
It is a best documentary on Sultan ul Ashiqeen Sultan Mohammad Najib ur Rehman. This video is in fact a short documentary which covers all important details about Sultan ul Ashiqeen. It is a latest documentary and undoubtedly the best documentary of all time.
#sultanulashiqeen #bestdocumentary #sultanbahoo #sultanularifeen #sultanulashiqeentv
This documentary video on Sultan ul Ashiqeen Hazrat Sakhi Sultan Mohammad Najib ur Rehman is presented & broadcasted by Sultan ul Faqr Digital Productions.
Voice: Sultan Mohammad Naeem Abbas Sarwari Qadri
Studio: Sultan-ul-Faqr Digital Productions (Regd.)
Presented By: Tehreek Dawat e Faqr (Regd.) Pakistan
Our Text Websites
entry.summary: It is a best documentary on Sultan ul Ashiqeen Sultan Mohammad Najib ur Rehman. This video is in fact a short documentary which covers all important details about Sultan ul Ashiqeen. It is a latest documentary and undoubtedly the best documentary of all time. #sultanulashiqeen #bestdocumentary #sultanbahoo #sultanularifeen #sultanulashiqeentv This documentary video on Sultan ul Ashiqeen Hazrat Sakhi Sultan Mohammad Najib ur Rehman is presented & broadcasted by Sultan ul Faqr Digital Productions. entry.title: China Tenderஐ ரத்து செய்த India Tender For 44 Vande Bharat Trains Oneindia Tamil

link.title: China Tenderஐ ரத்து செய்த India Tender For 44 Vande Bharat Trains Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
இந்திய எல்லையில் சீனாவின் அத்துமீறல்களுக்குப் பின் இந்தியா-சீனா இடையேயான நட்புறவு மிகப்பெரிய அளவில் விரிசல் அடைந்துள்ளது மட்டும் அல்லாமல் தற்போது வர்த்தக உறவும் பெரிய அளவில் பாதிக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. இந்த நிலையில் வந்தே பாரத் ரெயில்களுக்கான பெட்டிகளை தயாரிக்க விடப்பட்ட சர்வதேச அளவிலான டெண்டரை கைப்பற்ற சீனா முயற்சி செய்ததால் டெண்டரை இந்திய ரெயில்வே ரத்து செய்துள்ளது.
The railways on Friday cancelled the tender for manufacturing of 44 sets of semi-high speed train set or Vande Bharat. A company with Chinese partner had put a bid for these trains.
#IndiaChinaFight
#VandeBharat
#ChinaTenderCancel
entry.summary: இந்திய எல்லையில் சீனாவின் அத்துமீறல்களுக்குப் பின் இந்தியா-சீனா இடையேயான நட்புறவு மிகப்பெரிய அளவில் விரிசல் அடைந்துள்ளது மட்டும் அல்லாமல் தற்போது வர்த்தக உறவும் பெரிய அளவில் பாதிக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. இந்த நிலையில் வந்தே பாரத் ரெயில்களுக்கான பெட்டிகளை தயாரிக்க விடப்பட்ட சர்வதேச அளவிலான டெண்டரை கைப்பற்ற சீனா முயற்சி செய்ததால் டெண்டரை இந்திய ரெயில்வே ரத்து செய்துள்ளது. The railways on Friday cancelled the tender for manufacturing of 44 sets of semi-high speed train set or Vande Bharat. A company with Chinese partner had put a bid for these trains. #IndiaChinaFight #VandeBharat #ChinaTenderCancel

entry.title: Schools Reopen In AP : సెప్టెంబర్ 5 నుండే.. కొత్త అకడమిక్ క్యాలెండర్ రెడీ!

link.title: Schools Reopen In AP : సెప్టెంబర్ 5 నుండే.. కొత్త అకడమిక్ క్యాలెండర్ రెడీ!

entry.content:
The AP government has prepared an academic calendar in view of the current situation to maintain schools from September 5. The government has decided to reduce the curriculum by 30 per cent to avoid putting pressure on students.
#APSchools
#SchoolsReopenInAP
#AdimulapuSuresh
#YSJagan
#APDegreeExams
#APPGExams
#APEducationMinister
#AndhraPradesh
ఏపీలో బడి గంట మోగే సమయం ఆసన్నమైంది. కరోనా వైరస్ వ్యాప్తి నేపధ్యంలో ఇంతకాలం మూతపడిన స్కూల్స్ తిరిగి తెరగడానికి ఏపీ ప్రభుత్వం సన్నాహాలు చేస్తోంది. ఏపీలో కేసులు పెరుగుతున్నా సరే , వాటి కట్టడి కోసం ప్రయత్నిస్తున్న సర్కార్ విద్యా సంవత్సరం నష్టం కాకుండా కరోనా విషయంలో జాగ్రత్తలు వహిస్తూ స్కూల్స్ నడపాలని భావిస్తుంది .
entry.summary: The AP government has prepared an academic calendar in view of the current situation to maintain schools from September 5. The government has decided to reduce the curriculum by 30 per cent to avoid putting pressure on students. #APSchools #SchoolsReopenInAP #AdimulapuSuresh #YSJagan #APDegreeExams #APPGExams #APEducationMinister #AndhraPradesh ఏపీలో బడి గంట మోగే సమయం ఆసన్నమైంది. కరోనా వైరస్ వ్యాప్తి నేపధ్యంలో ఇంతకాలం మూతపడిన స్కూల్స్ తిరిగి తెరగడానికి ఏపీ ప్రభుత్వం సన్నాహాలు చేస్తోంది. ఏపీలో కేసులు పెరుగుతున్నా సరే , వాటి కట్టడి కోసం ప్రయత్నిస్తున్న సర్కార్ విద్యా సంవత్సరం నష్టం కాకుండా కరోనా విషయంలో జాగ్రత్తలు వహిస్తూ స్కూల్స్ నడపాలని భావిస్తుంది .

entry.title: Hundreds of students demonstrate in London against A-Level markdowns

link.title: Hundreds of students demonstrate in London against A-Level markdowns

entry.content:
Hundreds of students demonstrated at Parliament Square in London on Sunday (August 16th) against the markdown of their predicted A-Level grades before marching to the Department For Education.
Many have had their university hopes dashed and fear that even if their results are reviewed they will not be able to attend their chosen universities.
entry.summary: Hundreds of students demonstrated at Parliament Square in London on Sunday (August 16th) against the markdown of their predicted A-Level grades before marching to the Department For Education. Many have had their university hopes dashed and fear that even if their results are reviewed they will not be able to attend their chosen universities.

entry.title: Never Get Too Excited For Singing

link.title: Never Get Too Excited For Singing

entry.content: It’s good to multitask but a bad idea to get lost in the song. Especially when you are dealing with a hot hair straightener or curling iron.
entry.summary: It’s good to multitask but a bad idea to get lost in the song. Especially when you are dealing with a hot hair straightener or curling iron.

entry.title: Efforts to curb sexual crimes against children ongoing, Dewan Rakyat told

link.title: Efforts to curb sexual crimes against children ongoing, Dewan Rakyat told

entry.content:
The Women, Family and Community Development Ministry’s efforts to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse is ongoing, says its deputy minister Datuk Siti Zailah Mohd Yusoff on Tuesday.
However, the deputy minister did not answer whether the sex offender registry had been updated when asked by Segambut MP Hannah Yeoh.
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: The Women, Family and Community Development Ministry’s efforts to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse is ongoing, says its deputy minister Datuk Siti Zailah Mohd Yusoff on Tuesday. However, the deputy minister did not answer whether the sex offender registry had been updated when asked by Segambut MP Hannah Yeoh. WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Bandhay Ek Dour Se Episode 8

link.title: Bandhay Ek Dour Se Episode 8

entry.content:
Many times, the relationships we tend to believe are strong are in reality much weaker and the relationships that we think are weak end up being strong and supportive. Belonging to a middle-class joint family, Umar, a young and handsome man is in love with Roshni who happens to be the neighbor of Umar’s aunt Zakia. Due to family rivalry, both the families have hostile relationship. However, Umar is friends with his cousin Maheen.
While Umar is struggling to make peace within the families, self-centered Roshni has aspirations and dreams of her own which leads to devastating circumstances for Umar, Roshni and Maheen. Despite of Umar’s struggles, misunderstandings force the families to fall apart leaving Umar’s hopes and dreams unfulfilled. As Roshni’s conflicted loyalties begin to affect their relationship, will Umar realize the importance of blood relations? Will Umar ever be able to forget his past and make the right decision?
entry.summary: Many times, the relationships we tend to believe are strong are in reality much weaker and the relationships that we think are weak end up being strong and supportive. Belonging to a middle-class joint family, Umar, a young and handsome man is in love with Roshni who happens to be the neighbor of Umar’s aunt Zakia. Due to family rivalry, both the families have hostile relationship. However, Umar is friends with his cousin Maheen. While Umar is struggling to make peace within the families, self-centered Roshni has aspirations and dreams of her own which leads to devastating circumstances for Umar, Roshni and Maheen. Despite of Umar’s struggles, misunderstandings force the families to fall apart leaving Umar’s hopes and dreams unfulfilled. As Roshni’s conflicted loyalties begin to affect their relationship, will Umar realize the importance of blood relations? Will Umar ever be able to forget his past and make the right decision?

entry.title: Forging a Bronze Dagger - David Delagardelle - AWE Me Artists Series

link.title: Forging a Bronze Dagger - David Delagardelle - AWE Me Artists Series

entry.content:
Artist David DelaGardelle shares his artwork and forging magic in this episode.
Special thanks to Coal Iron Works
Featured Artist - David DelaGardelle of Cedarlore Forge
Coal Iron Works forging press

Your Love - Instrumental

Baltimore Knife and Sword

Location filming/edit - David DelaGardelle
